case_title: LEELA MOLEX VS. EXCEL MOVING SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXCEL MOVING SERVICES PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIMCO NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOLEX, LEELA AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MOVING SERVICES AIMCO (MR. JIMMY ARNOLD / MS. CRYSTAL FRANK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NOT SIGNED BY NAME SPECIFIED ON CARD, SIGNED BY ROBERT FRIED...** SERVED AUG-05-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXCEL MOVING SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXCEL MOVING SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-05-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO (MR. JIMMY ARNOLD / MS. CRYSTAL FRANK)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLEX, LEELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXCEL MOVING SERVICES AIMCO (MR. JIMMY ARNOLD / MS. CRYSTAL FRANK) THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSSES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
